title: Business Development Manager [Rotary / Chemical Plan] - WCAN
description:
Responsibilities:

  • Lead and coordinate techno-commercial activities independently to ensure smooth business operations, under department supervision.
  • Manage technical requirements, troubleshooting, inventory audits, inspections, and client communications.
  • Oversee projects and service tasks including proposal development and on-site activities.
  • Develop and maintain client relationships to support business growth in after-sales, projects, and supervisory services.
  • Available for frequent travel and site work across multiple locations.
  • Support service teams in quote preparation, technical discussions, and coordination with equipment manufacturers and suppliers.

Service Support Responsibilities:

  • Lead after-sales operations involving clients, vendors, manufacturers, and other stakeholders.
  • Manage commercial aspects within the service group to ensure smooth transaction flow.
  • Support day-to-day service activities such as quoting, purchase order management, and technical-commercial negotiations.
  • Facilitate technical coordination and troubleshooting between clients and manufacturers.
  • Maintain technical documentation, maintenance records, and spare parts inventories.
  • Prepare technical and commercial proposals for projects.
  • Collaborate with project teams on planning and execution.
  • Foster communication and relationships with clients, procurement, and other key contacts.
  • Conduct site visits for maintenance shutdowns or technical discussions.

Business Development Duties:

  • Lead business promotion through marketing initiatives and client engagement.
  • Organize sales efforts including client meetings, service presentations, and follow-ups.
  • Identify new business opportunities and develop service offerings, obtaining necessary approvals.
  • Handle commercial functions such as billing, invoicing, contract negotiation, taxation, insurance, and compliance.
  • Assist in preparing periodic reports on technical services for management review.
  • Provide technical training and knowledge sharing within the team.


Qualifications:

  • Bachelor's degree in Mechanical Engineering or related field
  • 12 to 17 years of comprehensive industry experience
  • 8 to 10 years focused on maintenance within chemical processing facilities
  • Minimum 5 years of specialized experience in the design and management of rotary equipment
  • Extensive expertise in maintenance operations, including spare parts management, shutdown coordination, troubleshooting, equipment design, and vendor liaison related to rotary machinery
  • Well-versed in reliability-centered maintenance principles, shutdown planning, and advanced troubleshooting techniques
  • Fundamental knowledge of chemical plant processes and construction practices
  • Proven track record in leading maintenance teams and managing projects effectively
  • Experience working in diverse, multinational work environments
  • Willingness to travel internationally and conduct regular site inspections
  • Excellent communication skills with a professional and approachable attitude


We regret only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. All applications will be handled confidentially. By submitting your application, you agree to the collection, use, retention, and disclosure of your personal information to prospective employers.


Wecruit Pte Ltd

Wecruit is one of the leading recruitment firms based in Singapore, dedicated to helping job seekers find the right career opportunities.


We partner with reputable companies across a wide range of industries, including Healthcare, IT, Corporate Support, Engineering, Education, Logistics & Supply Chain, Oil & Gas, and Maritime. 


Whether you're looking for permanent roles or short-term assignments, our consultants take the time to understand your experience, preferences, and goals to match you with suitable roles.

With over 1,000 successful placements and a strong track record of candidate satisfaction, Wecruit is here to support your career journey.


Let us help you take the next step—reach out to explore current opportunities or to speak with our team.
